data.title: Wipro Q2 Earnings: IT Services Revenue Decline 2%, Proposes 1:1 Stock Bonus
data.description: Wipro Ltd (NYSE: WIT) stock slid after reporting Q2 results with revenue of INR223.0B ($2.66B), missing analyst estimate of $2.67B, EPS in line.

data.title: This Uber Analyst Is No Longer Bullish; Here Are Top 5 Downgrades For Thursday
TransDigm, Easterly Government Properties, Booz Allen Hamilton And An Energy Stock On CNBC's 'Final Trades'
data.description: On CNBC's "Halftime Report Final Trades," Stephen Weiss of Short Hills Capital Partners named TransDigm as his final trade.

data.title: European Central Bank Lowers Interest Rates Again, First Back-To-Back Cuts In 13 Years
data.description: The European Central Bank on Thursday lowered the deposit rate by 25 basis points. The widely-anticipated move marks the ECB's third interest rate cut of the year.

data.title: How To Earn $500 A Month From FNB Corp. Stock Ahead Of Q3 Earnings Results
data.description: FNB, known for its subsidiary First National Bank, offers an annual dividend yield of 3.33%. Here's how you can earn $500 monthly.
